build.gitRepositoryMissing: [en-US] git.repository is not set, unable to auto clone.
build.docsDirectoryNotFolder: [en-US] {dir} is not a folder, unable to auto clone.
build.gitRepoYes: [en-US] Target {dir} is a Git repository, Git info will be shown.
build.gitRepoNo: [en-US] Target {dir} is not a Git repository, Git info will not be shown.
build.gitRepoYesButDisabled: [en-US] Target {dir} is a Git repository, but git.showInfo is disabled, Git info will not be shown.
build.autoCloneDocsNotGit: [en-US] {dir} exists but is not a Git repository. Please check/remove it and retry.
build.autoCloneRepoMismatch: [en-US] {dir} exists but repository mismatches. expected: {expected}, actual: {actual}
build.autoCloneBranchMismatch: [en-US] {dir} exists but branch mismatches. expected: {expected}, actual: {actual}
build.gitBranchMissing: [en-US] git.branch is not configured. Auto clone is disabled.
build.cloneFailedOrTimeout: [en-US] Clone failed or timed out. Please check repository access or network.
build.autoCreateDocsDir: [en-US] Target {dir} does not exist, creating it automatically.
app.immersiveHint: Immersive mode enabled (double-tap within 1 seconds to exit)
warning.title: Docs not found
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The current path does not match any page. Please check the URL.
